focus: Run /setup and get the user to their first useful cortextOS workflow with the smallest safe starter team
goals: Capture one concrete first outcome and safety boundaries
Discover available tools without collecting secrets in chat
Recommend the smallest starter agent team
Create day-one workflow and handoff docs
Teach tasks, approvals, crons, memory, and outputs by doing
Approval-gate any agent creation or external mutation
success_criteria: At least one setup task is completed or blocked on approval/human action
